name: whisper-mcp
description: Speech-to-text via OpenAI Whisper API + local whisper.cpp fallback. Transcription, language detection, optional translation to English.

auth.credential_source: Required for API backend; local whisper.cpp backend needs no auth.

tools.name: audio_authenticate
tools.description: Store OpenAI key (for API backend) or path to whisper.cpp binary (for local).

tools.name: audio_transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe audio file or URL to text. Word-level timestamps optional.

tools.name: audio_detect_language
tools.description: Detect spoken language from a short audio sample.

tools.name: audio_translate
tools.description: Transcribe and translate any source language to English.
